Thanks for contributing to gg-relay! Please fill in each section below.
Keep PRs small and focused; link the originating plan so reviewers have
context.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences describing what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check one (or more) that applies. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Docs (README, plan, spec, comments)
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] Test (adds or updates tests only)
- [ ] Chore (build, CI, tooling, dependencies)

## Test plan

<!--
How did you verify this works? Provide commands / steps a reviewer can
re-run locally. Tick boxes as they pass.
-->

- [ ] `uv run pytest` passes
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `uv run mypy src` passes
- [ ] Manually verified: <describe>
